summary: Amazon.com Inc. is set to raise C$14 billion ($10 billion) from investment-grade bonds in Canadian dollars, the largest such offering on record, as US hyperscalers look beyond their home market to fund artificial intelligence spending.

title_cn: BMO表示，美元是新的全球高利率制度下的最佳选择
summary: Betting on continued US dollar strength is the cleanest way for foreign-exchange traders to take a position on a new regime of higher rates and inflation, according to BMO Capital Markets.

title_cn: 在稀有销售扰乱加密货币后策略恢复购买比特币
summary: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. resumed buying Bitcoin a week after a rare token sale by the digital asset treasury company roiled the crypto market.

title_cn: Blue Owl 基金遭遇赎回，将出售 5 亿美元债券
summary: One of Blue Owl Capital Inc.’s private credit funds that capped redemptions earlier this year is set to raise $500 million from an investment-grade bond sale.

title: Giant Oil Supertanker Orders Eclipse Record Set in 2008
title_cn: 巨型石油超级油轮订单刷新 2008 年创纪录
summary: The world’s shipowners have placed orders for a record number of new oil supertankers, surpassing a boom back in 2008 that ultimately led to a glut and a collapse in rates.

title: Drahi Reaches €20 Billion Deal to Sell Phone Carrier SFR
title_cn: Drahi 达成 200 亿欧元出售电话运营商 SFR 的协议
summary: Billionaire Patrick Drahi has reached an agreement to sell French mobile carrier SFR to a consortium of rival telecommunications firms, in a deal that values the company €20.4 billion ($23.5 billion) and will test regulators’ tolerance for consolidation.

title: Private Share Marketplace Hiive Shops Equity as IPO Boom Nears
title_cn: 随着 IPO 热潮临近，私人股票市场 Hiive 购买股票
summary: The Hiive Co., an online platform for trading shares in pre-public companies, recently held talks with investors about a secondary stock sale that would have valued the firm at about $780 million, according to a document seen by Bloomberg.

title: SpaceX IPO Fuels Space Economy Buzz
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股引发太空经济热潮
summary: SpaceX is just days from Wall Street's biggest IPO ever. And as capital pours into the Space Economy, the opportunities go beyond rocketships. Space exploration yields critical infrastructure for plenty of Earth-bound industries, like agriculture and drug research. Ross Hamilton, the COO of Space Network and the author of "Everything is Flying" joined Bloomberg Open Interest to talk about how space technology already runs modern life on Earth and why a SpaceX IPO could reshape far more than the space industry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin’s $235 Billion Crash Masks a Bigger Shift Across Crypto
title_cn: 比特币 2350 亿美元的暴跌掩盖了加密货币领域的更大转变
summary: The easiest way to understand crypto used to be to look at Bitcoin.

title: A 20-Year Real Estate “Super Cycle” Is Beginning: Rabil
title_cn: 20年房地产“超级周期”即将开始：Rabil
summary: Kayne Anderson CEO Al Rabil joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why he believes housing, medical offices, senior housing, and industrial real estate are entering a 20-year super cycle. He argues supply constraints, aging demographics, and AI-driven efficiencies will create powerful tailwinds, while operational expertise, not just capital, will separate winners from the competition. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: European Stocks Fall on Mideast Tensions; Zealand Pharma Sinks
title_cn: 欧洲股市因中东紧张局势而下跌；西兰制药水槽
summary: European stocks fell after a choppy session as investors reacted to conflicting signals about the war in the Middle East.

title: Stocks Gain as Buyers Step In After AI-Led Selloff
title_cn: 人工智能主导的抛售后，买家介入，股市上涨
summary:
Wall Street staged a comeback as dip buyers emerged, lifting stocks amid renewed enthusiasm over artificial intelligence and bets that a solid economy will keep powering Corporate America.
Chris Harvey, Head of Equity & Portfolio Strategy at CIBC Capital Markets, discusses signs of a potential market melt-up. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rising Dollar Swings Threaten to Upend Resilient Carry Trades
title_cn: 美元波动加剧可能会颠覆具有弹性的套利交易
summary: Rising dollar volatility is endangering a currency-trading strategy that had been a steady winner in recent months.

title: US Stocks Rebound From Selloff as Chipmakers Lead Broad Gains
title_cn: 由于芯片制造商大幅上涨，美国股市从抛售中反弹
summary: US stocks advanced on Monday, paring last week’s slump, as chipmakers headed for their best session in a year and traders assessed flaring tensions in the Middle East, which supported oil prices and energy shares.

title: Apple Investors Look for AI Overhaul to Power Next Leg of Gains
title_cn: 苹果投资者寻求人工智能改革以推动下一阶段的收益
summary: Apple Inc. investors have spent nearly two years clamoring for the iPhone maker to make a big splash with artificial intelligence. Their wait may finally be coming to an end this week at the company’s annual Worldwide Developers Conference.

title: US Steel Sees Pennsylvania Overhaul Costing Up to $2.5 Billion
title_cn: 美国钢铁公司预计宾夕法尼亚州检修成本高达 25 亿美元
summary: US Steel said investments to upgrade its Mon Valley operations in Pennsylvania could total as much as $2.5 billion, more than double Nippon Steel Corp.’s minimum commitment as part of its takeover offer for the American company.

title: United Airlines CEO on Demand, Consumers, Oil Prices
title_cn: 联合航空首席执行官随需应变、消费者、油价
summary: Despite worries in other regions of the world, United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby says airline demand and capacity in the US remains strong, and consumers remain resilient despite some fare increases driven by the spike in oil prices caused by the conflict in Iran. Kirby spoke to Lisa Abramowicz at IATA in Rio de Janeiro on June 7, 2026. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Air France Could Consider Being Part of EasyJet Bid, CEO Says
title_cn: 首席执行官表示，法航可能考虑参与易捷航空竞购
summary: In an interview at the IATA annual meeting in Rio de Janeiro, Air France-KLM CEO Benjamin Smith said the airline may need to raise ticket prices to compensate for rising fuel costs sparked by war in the Middle East. The carrier is also looking to reopen routes to the region when  it's safer. Smith signaled he’d be willing to consider becoming involved in a bid for EasyJet Plc.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Remittances Lift India’s Current Account, Cushion War Shock
title_cn: 汇款提振印度经常账户，缓解战争冲击
summary: India recorded a surprise current account surplus in the January-March period as strong services receipts and higher remittances offset disruptions caused by the Iran war.

title: GE Aerospace CEO Is Optimistic for More China Deals
title_cn: GE航空航天首席执行官对更多中国交易持乐观态度
summary: In an interview at the IATA annual meeting in Rio de Janeiro, GE Aerospace CEO Larry Culp remained optimistic that GE could secure more aircraft-engine orders from China following a meeting between President Donald Trump and his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping in Beijing the previous month, after which their manufacturing partner, Boeing Co. secured an initial batch of commitments. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Etihad Airways CEO Says Carrier Is Discounting Tickets
title_cn: 阿提哈德航空首席执行官表示航空公司正在打折机票
summary: Etihad Airways CEO Antonoaldo Neves speaks to Bloomberg's Guy Johnson at the International Air Transport Association (IATA) conference in Rio de Janeiro. He says the carrier is discounting tickets by keeping fares at a stable level despite the 70% jump in fuel costs. Neves also talks about securing delivery dates for new aircraft from Boeing and Airbus SE. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Campbell's Earnings Beat; Eli Lilly Obesity Drug Results | Stock Movers
title_cn: 坎贝尔的盈利超出预期；礼来 (Eli Lilly) 肥胖药物结果 |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Shares of The Campbell's Company (CPB) edged higher ahead of the US market open after the canned soup maker reported adjusted earnings per share for the third quarter that beat the average analyst estimate.
- Eli Lilly (LLY) shares gained in the early session following obesity drug presentations at the American Diabetes Association conference. Citi analysts say their conviction on Lilly is firmly intact, given the company’s incretin portfolio is “not built around singular blockbusters.” 
- Shares of Marvell Technology (MRVL) and Flex (FLEX) are rising in premarket trading as the companies are set to replace Pool Corp. and Campbell’s in S&P 500 before the market open on June 22, S&P Dow Jones Indices says in emailed statement. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 6/8/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 6 月 8 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Inside a Brain-Chip Startup in China
title_cn: 中国脑芯片初创公司内部
summary: Brain-computer interfaces could dramatically alter how humans interact with technology. Startups around the world, including in China, are racing to get their devices approved for commercial use.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intel Gains on Report That Google Will Use It to Make Chips
title_cn: 有报道称谷歌将使用英特尔制造芯片，英特尔股价上涨
summary: Intel Corp. shares rose the most in a month after the Information reported that Alphabet Inc.’s Google will rely on it for more than 3 million specialized AI chips in 2028.

title: Docusign Shares Drop After Full-Year Guidance Disappoints Investors
title_cn: 全年指引令投资者失望后 Docusign 股价下跌
summary: Docusign's shares declined amid a broadly negative market day following the company's full-year guidance. Allan Thygesen, CEO of Docusign, discussed the company's AI-powered intelligent agreement management platform, highlighting strong adoption with 40,000 customers currently live on the platform. He speaks with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chicago’s Clout Takes Another Hit as Bears Plan Move to Indiana
title_cn: 随着熊队计划搬到印第安纳州，芝加哥的影响力再次受到打击
summary: Ken Griffin and his Citadel financial empire left Chicago for Florida in 2022. Boeing Co. said it would relocate its headquarters to Virginia around the same time. Now the Chicago Bears, the city’s iconic football team, say they’re moving across the state line to Indiana.

title: Apple’s Revamped AI Smashes Against Down Market
title_cn: 苹果改进后的人工智能冲击低迷的市场
summary:
Expectations are running high for Apple’s Worldwide Developers Conference, where the company is expected later Monday to unveil the biggest overhaul of Siri in years, including a chatbot-style interface and deeper integration across the iPhone, iPad and Mac.
Bloomberg Tech co-Host Ed Ludlow discusses his expectations for the conference and how developments in Siri could impact the rest of the AI space. He also addresses investor expectations for the upcoming SpaceX IPO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FTX Co-Founder Sam Bankman-Fried Applies for Trump Pardon
title_cn: FTX 联合创始人 Sam Bankman-Fried 申请特朗普赦免
summary: FTX co-founder Sam Bankman-Fried formally applied for a presidential pardon, more than two years after he was convicted over the multi-billion dollar collapse of his once-thriving cryptocurrency empire.

title: When Should Your Kid Get a Smartphone? Scientists Have an Answer
title_cn: 您的孩子应该什么时候获得智能手机？科学家给出了答案
summary: Thirteen. At the earliest.

title: Brain Implants Are Unlocking a New Human-Machine Reality
title_cn: 大脑植入物正在解锁新的人机现实
summary: The brain has emerged as a new frontier in medical technology. Bloomberg Primer explores where the next neurotechnology advances will lead.

title: Cipher Sells Junk Bonds to Fund Amazon-Tied Data Center Project
title_cn: Cipher 出售垃圾债券为亚马逊数据中心项目提供资金
summary: Cipher Digital Inc. is planning to raise $810 million from a junk-bond sale to help fund a data center tied to Amazon.com Inc.

title: Susquehanna’s Head of Prediction Markets on Market-Making
title_cn: Susquehanna 做市预测市场主管
summary: On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Jeremy Maletz, Susquehanna's head of macro trading and prediction markets, joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway to talk about his firm's partnership with Kalshi and how Susquehanna bridges the gap between prediction markets and large institutional investors. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Redemption Angst Spills Into Private Equity
title_cn: 赎回焦虑蔓延至私募股权
summary: Blackstone is looking to sell more than $2 billion of its stakes in private investment funds by bundling the exposure into bonds for investors. Sridhar Natarajan discusses the angst spilling into private equity on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Can't Young People Find Jobs?
title_cn: 年轻人为何找不到工作？
summary: For recent college graduates, the unemployment rate is reaching recession levels. But you shouldn’t blame AI, says Bloomberg Opinion columnist and economist Allison Schrager. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple’s WWDC to Unveil New AI, Siri and iOS 27 Features
title_cn: Apple WWDC 将推出新的 AI、Siri 和 iOS 27 功能
summary: The crowd during the 2025 Apple Worldwide Developers Conference in Cupertino, California. Photographer: Justin Sullivan/Getty Images

title: Wall Street Preps for the SpaceX IPO
title_cn: 华尔街为 SpaceX IPO 做准备
summary: SpaceX is heading for the biggest IPO ever. Bloomberg’s Bailey Lipschultz and Sridhar Natarajan join Bloomberg Open Interest to break down how Wall Street is preparing for the historic debut. Demand is already huge, but the real question is whether SpaceX’s massive offering helps reopen the IPO market, or just makes it even harder for everyone else. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google Orders More Than 3 Million Chips From Intel: Information
title_cn: 谷歌从英特尔订购了超过 300 万颗芯片：信息
summary: Alphabet's Google placed an order with Intel to manufacture more than 3 million of its specialized AI chips in 2028, the Information reported, citing two unnamed sources. Anurag Rana has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Vimeo Owner Bending Spoons Files for US IPO as Sales Rise
title_cn: 随着销售额上升，Vimeo 所有者 Bending Spoon 申请美国 IPO
summary: Bending Spoons, which acquires struggling software businesses, has filed for an initial public offering in New York, joining a string of European tech companies seeking US listings.

title: UK Plans to Purchase £400 Million of AI Chips as London Tech Week Begins
title_cn: 伦敦科技周开幕之际，英国计划购买 4 亿英镑的人工智能芯片
summary: UK AI & Online Safety Minister Kanishka Narayan joins Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie to kick off London Tech Week as part of Bloomberg's The Pulse. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin Steadies After $60,000 Breach as Saylor Adds to Hoard
title_cn: Saylor 增加囤积，比特币突破 60,000 美元后稳定
summary: Bitcoin steadied itself after dropping below the key threshold of $60,000, as Strategy Inc. Chairman Michael Saylor resumed making purchases of the token.

title: HSBC CEO Elhedery on GCC, Job Market & Banking Amid AI
title_cn: 汇丰银行首席执行官 Elhedery 谈海湾合作委员会、就业市场和人工智能时代的银行业
summary: HSBC's Georges Elhedery said the GCC has emerged from recent turmoil. He also told Francine Lacqua that ‘Human Judgment’ Is Vital as AI gathers pace.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jensen Huang Mania Sweeps Through Seoul
title_cn: 黄仁勋狂热席卷首尔
summary: Jensen Huang's South Korea visit wasn't all business. The Nvidia CEO met esports legend Faker, dined with tech titans, drew crowds like a rockstar, and even threw out the ceremonial first pitch at a baseball game. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Further Market Declines Would Be Healthy to See, Cameron Dawson Says
title_cn: 卡梅伦·道森表示，市场进一步下滑将是健康的结果
summary: Cameron Dawson, CIO at NewEdge Wealth, says semiconductor stocks are “nowhere near oversold” after last week’s selloff. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Urges NATO Allies to Use Defense Funds to Replace Huawei Gear
title_cn: 美国敦促北约盟国使用国防资金更换华为设备
summary: President Donald Trump’s administration urged NATO allies to channel defense spending toward efforts to replace components from China’s Huawei Technologies Co. in their networks and critical infrastructure, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Nvidia CEO Says Tech Stock Selloff Is a Buying Opportunity | The Pulse 6/8/2026
title_cn: 英伟达首席执行官表示科技股抛售是一个买入机会脉搏 2026 年 6 月 8 日
summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Lindsay Rosner, Goldman Sachs Asset Management Head of Multi-Sector Investing; Euan Blair, Multiverse CEO & Founder; Kanishka Narayan, UK AI & Online Safety Minister (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple’s Revamped AI Is a Long-Term Play in a Down PC, Mobile Phone Market
title_cn: 苹果改进的人工智能是低迷的个人电脑和手机市场的长期策略
summary: A revived Siri unlikely to spur iPhone, Mac sales in the near future

title: Uber Opens London Waitlist for Wayve Robotaxis Ahead of Launch
title_cn: Uber 在 Wayve Robotaxis 推出前在伦敦设立候补名单
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. has set up a waitlist for customers interested in riding in a robotaxi in London, ahead of a planned commercial debut in the UK this year.

title: Clean-Tech Venture Investors Face Concentration Risks in Funds
title_cn: 清洁技术风险投资者面临资金集中风险
summary: Investors in early-stage clean technologies in the US and Europe may be less diversified than they realize.

title: Bolivia’s President Signs Law Enabling Tougher Protest Crackdown
title_cn: 玻利维亚总统签署法律加强镇压抗议活动
summary: Bolivia’s embattled President Rodrigo Paz signed a measure that clears the way for a more aggressive crackdown on anti-government protests that have rocked the South American country for more than five weeks.

title: Germany and France Pull Plug on Next-Generation Jet Project
title_cn: 德国和法国终止下一代喷气机项目
summary: The German government said it agreed with France to halt a €100 billion ($115 billion) joint fighter-jet project after failing to overcome persistent cross-border disagreements and multiple delays since its initiation almost a decade ago.

title: How Israel’s Battle With Hezbollah Fits Into the Iran War
title_cn: 以色列与真主党的战斗如何融入伊朗战争
summary: After the US and Israel began their war with Iran on Feb. 28, the Iran-backed Lebanese militia Hezbollah was quick to join the fray, firing rockets and drones into Israel. Officials there saw in the crisis sweeping the region a chance to finally drive Hezbollah, already weakened by a series of setbacks, away from Israel’s northern border.

title: Pentagon Accuses Alibaba, Baidu of Aiding China’s Military
title_cn: 五角大楼指责阿里巴巴、百度援助中国军方
summary: The Pentagon identified some of China’s biggest companies including Alibaba Group Holding Ltd., Baidu Inc. and BYD Co. as entities that support the Chinese military, in a move that risks provoking new friction with the government in Beijing.

title: Italy Won’t Take Sides on Paschi, Says It’s All About the Money
title_cn: 意大利不会在帕斯基问题上选边站，表示一切都是为了钱
summary: Italy’s Finance Minister Giancarlo Giorgetti indicated the government won’t interfere in any battle for control of Banca Monte dei Paschi di Siena SpA, saying price will determine whether Banco BPM SpA or Intesa Sanpaolo SpA prevail.

title: Biden’s Defense Chief Austin Says US Navy Could Open Hormuz
title_cn: 拜登的国防部长奥斯汀表示美国海军可以打开霍尔木兹海峡
summary: Former Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin said the US Navy is capable of prying open the Strait of Hormuz but that an extended military operation to free up the vital oil and gas waterway would be costly and require allies.

title: Honeywell Expects to Absorb Iran Impact as War De-Escalates
title_cn: 随着战争升级，霍尼韦尔预计将吸收伊朗的影响
summary: Honeywell International Inc. reaffirmed its guidance ahead of the planned spinoff of its aerospace business, saying it expects to absorb the near-term financial impact from the war in Iran.

title: Former US Defense Secretary Austin Doesn't Think China Will Take Taiwan by Force
title_cn: 美国前国防部长奥斯汀不认为中国会武力占领台湾
summary: Former US Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin talks about the war in Iran, a possible peace deal, the importance of NATO and how a battle over Taiwan between the US and China could impact the global economy. He speaks to Bloomberg's London Bureau Chief Ruth David at the HSBC Gulf Cooperation Council Exchanges Conference in London. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Clashes in Pakistan-Controlled Kashmir Leave Seven Dead
title_cn: 巴控克什米尔冲突造成七人死亡
summary: Seven people were killed, while many others were injured in a clash between the recently proscribed Joint Awami Action Committee and the police on Sunday in the city of Rawalakot in the Pakistan-controlled region of Kashmir.

title: Prospects for Job Seekers Seen Worsening, NY Fed Survey Says
title_cn: 纽约联储调查显示，求职者的前景正在恶化
summary: Americans’ view of the labor market grew somewhat more pessimistic in May, with the perceived prospects for job seekers hitting their lowest point this year, according to a Federal Reserve Bank of New York survey released Monday.

title: India Seeks Protection From Future Trade Probes in US Deal
title_cn: 印度在美国协议中寻求保护免受未来贸易调查
summary: India has sought assurance from the US that it will not face any investigations under Section 301 once a trade agreement is signed between the two nations, according to an official from the South Asian country.

title: Pashinyan Wins Third Term as Armenia Backs Shift Toward West
title_cn: 亚美尼亚支持向西方转移，帕希尼扬赢得第三个任期
summary: Armenian Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan claimed victory in parliamentary elections as voters overwhelmingly backed the South Caucasus country’s turn toward the West and away from Russia.

title: G7 Ministers Seek Joint Fertilizer Action as War Roils Supplies
title_cn: 七国集团部长寻求联合化肥行动，应对战争扰乱供应
summary: Group of Seven nations are weighing joint action to protect farmers and bolster food security as the war in the Middle East disrupts fertilizer supplies.

title: Iran Halts Latest Israel Strikes, Trump Urges Ceasefire
title_cn: 伊朗停止以色列最新打击，特朗普敦促停火
summary:
Iran declared an end to its latest strikes against Israel, after tit-for-tat attacks that prompted President Donald Trump to call for a halt to fighting.

The escalation followed renewed fighting between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah in Lebanon, which remains a sticking point in peace negotiations. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: LA Mayor Race Flips as Socialist Beats Reality TV Star Pratt
title_cn: 社会主义者击败真人秀明星普拉特，洛杉矶市长竞选发生逆转
summary: Democratic incumbent Mayor Karen Bass and Democratic City Councilmember Nithya Raman will advance to the runoff in November for Los Angeles mayor, Decision Desk HQ projects.

title: Denmark’s F-35 Bill Overruns Plan by $2.2 Billion, Auditors Find
title_cn: 审计员发现丹麦的 F-35 法案超出计划 22 亿美元
summary: Denmark’s purchase of F-35 fighter jets will be about 14 billion kroner ($2.2 billion) more expensive than planned, according to the national auditors, who criticized the Nordic country’s government for giving inadequate information to parliament.

title: Trump Border Chief Vows New York ICE Surge, Says ‘It’s Coming’
title_cn: 特朗普边境局长誓言纽约 ICE 激增，称“它即将到来”
summary: The Trump administration has drawn up a plan to surge US Immigration and Customs Enforcement personnel to New York City, a move that threatens to escalate tensions with New York Governor Kathy Hochul over the president’s migrant crackdown.

title: Peru Vote Is Too Close to Call as Fujimori’s Lead Narrows
title_cn: 秘鲁投票结果势均力敌，藤森领先优势缩小
summary: Peru’s bitterly contested presidential election remained too close to call as conservative Keiko Fujimori’s razor-thin lead over leftist candidate Roberto Sánchez narrowed with votes still being counted.

title: Xi Pledges Deeper Ties With Kim While Avoiding Nuclear Issue
title_cn: 习近平承诺与金正恩深化关系，同时避免核问题
summary: President Xi Jinping vowed to expand China’s trade, agriculture and technology cooperation with North Korea, while avoiding public mentions of its neighbor’s nuclear program in a meeting with Kim Jong Un in Pyongyang.

title: US Allies Seek Trump’s Approval of Hormuz Demining Mission
title_cn: 美国盟友寻求特朗普批准霍尔木兹排雷任务
summary: US allies will seek President Donald Trump’s approval for a Europe-led plan to demine the Strait of Hormuz at next week’s Group of Seven summit in France.

title: Democrats Have a Conundrum in Maine Primary
title_cn: 民主党在缅因州初选遇到难题
summary: Graham Platner shows the risk of backing a complete unknown

title: Trump Says Iran Blockade Remains, Demands an End to Shooting
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗封锁依然存在，要求停止枪击
summary: President Donald Trump said the US would maintain its blockade of Iranian ports until there is a deal to end hostilities in the region after demanding Israel and Iran stop military action.

title: Trump’s Economy Polling Slides as Iran War Saps His Superpower
title_cn: 伊朗战争削弱了特朗普的超级大国，他的经济民调下滑
summary: President Donald Trump is barreling toward the midterm elections with a vulnerability that’s something new in his political life: Voters are losing faith in the Trump economy.

title: India Opposition Leaders Meet to Project Unity After Poll Losses
title_cn: 印度反对派领导人在民意调查失败后开会表达团结
summary: Leaders of India’s top opposition parties met in New Delhi in an effort to project unity, their first major gathering since the May state elections, which dealt significant blows to several regional parties.

title: Orban-Era Graft Cost Hungary $194 Billion, Watchdog Says
title_cn: 监管机构称，欧尔班时代的贪污腐败使匈牙利损失了 1,940 亿美元
summary: Entrenched corruption under former Hungarian leader Viktor Orban likely cost Hungary about 60 trillion forint ($194 billion) over the past 16 years, according to the head of the country’s anti-graft agency.

title: Pope Urges Justice for Clergy Abuse Victims During Spain Visit
title_cn: 教皇访问西班牙期间敦促为神职人员虐待受害者伸张正义
summary: Pope Leo XIV called for justice for victims of sexual abuse by Catholic clergy during a trip to Spain, where he plans to meet with those who have suffered.

title: Singapore’s PM Warns Full Impact of Mideast Conflict Yet to Come
title_cn: 新加坡总理警告中东冲突的全面影响尚未到来
summary: Singapore Prime Minister Lawrence Wong warned that the economy has yet to feel the full impact of the Middle East conflict, and uncertainty remains over the growth outlook despite a strong performance in the first quarter.
